summary: Fix saved-mode type candidate ownership matching so compact role-index names match saved crawler master names.
rootCause: Saved ownership sets contain crawler display names with the 【三國志 覇道】 prefix and readings removed by normalizeSaveItemName, while type-candidate rows use compact names with readings. The Update08.1 filter compared these strings directly, so owned generals/equipment were incorrectly excluded.
externalizationDecision: No HTML changes; the fix is in existing external JavaScript and a validation tool.
userPasteDataIfStillLow: HADO_DEV_INFO.json の displayVersion shown by the preview
Current save export JSON with personal notes removed if desired, especially saves[].generals and saves[].equipments
The selected purpose/type in the type navigation
Candidate count shown for each role tab in the type candidate modal
